expectations.text: Agent uses podman to run the container
expectations.evidence: Agent reports command: 'podman run --rm -v "...input/src:/src:Z" docker.io/pmdcode/pmd:latest check -d /src -R rulesets/java/quickstart.xml -f text -r /output/pmd-report.txt' — uses podman, not local PMD.
Command uses '-d /src'. Report file paths show /src/main/java/com/example/OrderProcessor.java confirming scan target was /src.

Command includes '-R rulesets/java/quickstart.xml'. Violations found span quickstart rules: UnusedPrivateField, EmptyCatchBlock, UnusedLocalVariable, EmptyControlStatement, UnusedFormalParameter, UnusedPrivateMethod.

expectations.text: Agent generates both text and XML report files
expectations.evidence: Both pmd-report.txt (1254 bytes) and pmd-report.xml (4483 bytes) exist and are non-empty at the outputs/ directory.

expectations.text: Report output file exists at the expected path
expectations.evidence: Files confirmed at outputs/pmd-report.txt (1254 bytes) and outputs/pmd-report.xml (4483 bytes).

expectations.text: Violations are detected (exit code 4 or report shows violations)
expectations.evidence: Exit code was 4 (violations found). Report shows 11 distinct violations across Best Practices (7), Error Prone (2), and Code Style (1) categories.
